actionable: Ensure all subscription terms (including recurring charges) are clearly displayed and explicitly confirmed before any payment is processed.
Provide a simple, in-app option to cancel subscriptions at any time, with immediate confirmation.
Improve customer support responsiveness and accuracy, moving beyond automated bots to human agents for cancellation and refund requests.
Offer a no-questions-asked refund policy for unauthorized or accidental charges within a reasonable period (e.g., 30 days).
Eliminate the use of ‘free trial’ or ‘£1 offer’ that auto-enrolls users in a full-price subscription without clear, conspicuous disclosure.
